free_text: Spallation of nickel by 9 GeV/c protons and deuterons.
Decay data are presented.
The nickel target stacks consisted of three 31 mg/cm2
thick foils. The target foils enclosed in Mylar
catchers 17.5 mg/cm2 thick were preceded on the
upstream side by a 20 mg/cm2 aluminium foils
surrounded by 6 mg/cm2 Al guard foils.
High resolution Ge(Li) detector was used.
Errors consist of errors from counting
statistics, detector efficiency and target thickness.
Systematic error corresponding to the
beam flux monitor is not included into DATA-ERR
values.
